inputs.text: main thoda bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, aur thoda kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

inputs.text: ab mujhe khansi bhi aa rahi hai, aur ye khansi sukh hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Cough could be a progression of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still unlikely, as cough is dry and not persistent

inputs.text: raat ko mujhe bahut pasina aata hai, aur main wazan bhi kam ho raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats and weight loss are cardinal signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as bronchitis does not typically cause night sweats and weight loss

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Could be a consideration, but tuberculosis is more likely given the symptoms

inputs.text: main bahut kamjor mehsoos kar raha hoon, aur mere balgam mein khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness and hemoptysis confirm tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as bronchitis does not typically cause hemoptysis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as pneumonia does not typically cause hemoptysis and severe weight loss
